name: Acquire an Angel Statue
remarks: Dropped by Avenger Knight, Yukiko's Castle (6F-7F)

name: Acquire a Demon Statue
remarks: Dropped by Magical Magus, Yukiko's Castle (6F-7F)

name: The Girl on the Rooftop
quest_giver: Male student by the window, Classroom 2-2
remarks: Talk to the girl on the roof 3 times; can only ask one question per day.

name: Acquire a Ritz Wire
quest_giver: Male student near Science Room, Practice Building 1F
remarks: Dropped by Heat Balance, Yukiko's Castle (6F-7F)

name: Acquire Mori Ranmaru Shochu
quest_giver: Man to the west, Samegawa Flood Plain
remarks: Check sake barrels in the Twisted Shopping District's version of Konishi Liquors

name: I Wish for Love
remarks: Talk to the girl on 3 different days, in the school lobby, then Practice Building 2F (select "I read it") twice

name: Desk Refurbishing
remarks: Dropped by Laughing Table, Yukiko's Castle (6F-7F)

name: Book Exchange
quest_giver: Avid reader in front of Yomenaido Bookstore
remarks: Give him a Peach Seed

name: Acquire an Old Key
remarks: Dropped by Bribed Fuzz, Steamy Bathhouse (1F-2F)

name: Extracurricular Activities
remarks: Dropped by Trance Twins, Yukiko's Castle (3F-5F)

name: Acquire Coal
quest_giver: Loud Old Man, Shopping District North
remarks: Dropped by Selfish Basalt, Steamy Bathhouse (7F-8F)

name: Desk Refurbishing Part 2
remarks: Dropped by Crying Table, Steamy Bathhouse (9F-10F)

name: I Wish I Didn't Crave for Snacks
remarks: Talk to Slim Lady, Shopping District South; get Meat Gum from Chie and give to Slim Lady

name: Please Feed the Cat
quest_giver: Avid reader in front of Yomenaido Bookstore
remarks: Feed the cat one fish

name: Acquire a Crooked Cross
remarks: Dropped by Tranquil Idol, Steamy Bathhouse (7F-8F)

name: Acquire a Horn
remarks: Dropped by Grave Beetle, Steamy Bathhouse (9F-10F)

name: Please Find my Younger Twin
quest_giver: Orange haired girl, Shopping District South
remarks: Talk to her twin on Samegawa Flood Plain, then return

name: Carbon Copy
quest_giver: Orange haired girl, Samagawa Flood Plain
remarks: Dropped by Soul Dancer, Marukyu Striptease (1F-3F)

name: Acquire a Silver Lump
quest_giver: Male student near Science Room, Practice Building 1F
remarks: Dropped by Silver Dice, Marukyu Striptease (7F-10F)

name: We Wish our Dog Would Return
remarks: Talk gently to the dog at the Riverbed and Shopping District North until it can be fed a Steak Skewer (buy at Souzai Daigaku)

name: Acquire a Charmed Veil
remarks: Dropped by Liberating Idol, Marukyu Striptease (5F-10F)

name: Acquire Hard Boots
quest_giver: Avid reader in front of Yomenaido Bookstore
remarks: Buy from Daidara Metalworks (Sell Thick Hide x10)

name: Who's the Riddle Master?!
remarks: "Group A," "Top 6 Flag Colors"

name: Acquire an Eternal Lamp
quest_giver: Refreshed old man, Samegawa Flood Plain
remarks: Dropped by Amenti Raven, Void Quest (3F-4F)

name: Feed the Cat
remarks: Feed the cat fish once a day for 7 days

name: I Wish I Had Friends
remarks: Talk to the boy on Samegawa Flood Plain ("I don't want your money"); give him a Prize Sticker earned by buying from Tanaka's Amazing Commodities; talk to him again, then get a sticker from Nanako to give him, then talk to him the following day

name: Acquire Some Fashionable Dishes
quest_giver: Avid reader in front of Yomenaido Bookstore
remarks: Dropped by Sky Balance, Marukyu Striptease (9F-10F), 3 needed

name: Carbon Copy, Part 2
remarks: Dropped by Blind Cupid, Void Quest (3F-4F)

name: Experiment in Telepathy
remarks: Talk to the Older twin in Shopping District, South, then talk to the Younger twin on the Samegawa Riverbed and pick the first choice, come back and talk to the Older twin

name: I Wish My Life Had Meaning Again
reward:
Hermit Social Link Up
Unfinished Model
remarks: Talk to the Haggard Man, Shopping District North ("Want me to make it?"); build the Unfinished Model over 4 days, then give it to him

name: Extracurricular Activities, Part 2
remarks: Dropped by Steel Machine, Void Quest (9F-10F)

name: Acquire a Crystal Ball
remarks: Dropped by Constancy Relic, Secret Laboratory (1F-2F)

name: Acquire Fine Coal
quest_giver: Loud Old Man, Shopping District North
remarks: Dropped by Power Castle, Secret Laboratory (7F-8F)

name: A Test of Literary Memory
quest_giver: Avid reader in front of Yomenaido Bookstore
remarks: "Judo Medalist Names," "How one should live as a punk," "2 pages per pest," "Me"

name: Desk Refurbishing, Part 3
remarks: Dropped by Furious Gigas, Secret Laboratory (3F-4F)

name: I Wish I Was Better at Speaking
remarks: Talk to the girl on the roof; "Do you need help speaking?", "Give her lessons" (Expression Rank 3+), then "Apologize to her" (Courage Rank 3+)

name: Acquire a High-Speed Gear
remarks: Dropped by Mach Wheel, Secret Laboratory (5F-6F)

name: A Twin's Independence
remarks: Dropped by Elegant Mother, Secret Laboratory (7F-8F)

name: Acquire a Training Shell
remarks: Dropped by Wicked Turret, Secret Laboratory (7F-8F)

name: Experiments in Telepathy, Part 2
remarks: Speak to the Riverbed Twin, then the Bookstore Twin; repeat

name: I Wish I Didn't Fear Cats
remarks: Talk to the fearful man at Samegawa Flood Plain ("Is it a cat?"), then talk to the cat outside the Dojima Residence, and bring the man to see the cat; give the man a Red Goldfish, then talk to him the next day

name: I Wish My Wallet Would Return
remarks: Talk to the woman near the trash can, Samegawa Flood Plain; check the area to find the wrong wallet and try to give it to her; find her wallet in the bushes near Tatsuhime Shrine and give it to her

name: The Girl on the Rooftop, Part 2
quest_giver: Male student by the window, Classroom 2-2
remarks: Dropped by Prime Magus, Heaven (1F-2F)

name: Desk Refurbishing, Part 4
remarks: Dropped by Angry Table, Heaven (5F-7F)

name: Acquire an Old Ore
remarks: Dropped by Revelation Pesce, Heaven (6F-7F)

name: Acquire a Modest Lamp
remarks: Dropped by Phantom Lord, Heaven (3F-5F)

name: Riddle Senpai Returns!
remarks: "Group A," "Human motion," "Group B," "Indefinite articles"

name: I Wish to See Samegawa's Guardian
remarks: Catch a "Huge Fish," bring to the Old Man and ask about the Guardian; use the Angler's Set to catch it (only found on rainy days or in December)

name: Cat Needs Food Badly
remarks: Feed the cat fish on 20 different days, or 4 different days if fed the Guardian each time

name: Revenge of Riddle Senpai!
remarks: "Group B," "The way they're drawn," "Promethium," "Need"

name: The Shichiri Beach Guardian
remarks: Unlock Shichiri Beach by riding the scooter a total of six times, then try and fail to fish at the beach. Speak to the Old Man at the riverbank, who will ask for a River Guardian. Remember to ask him about bait for the Guardian so that Inaba Jewel Beetles can be caught in the Shrine at night. Fish for the River Guardian while it's raining. Show the River Guardian to him to get the Angler's Set that enables sea fishing at the beach and also hear about how to get Genji Beetles. The Sea Guardian can be caught from Shichiri Beach while it's raining.

name: Tissue Distribution
quest_giver: Man in front of theater, Okina City
remarks: Distribute the tissues to everyone in the area then talk to him again to complete the request.

name: 100% Inaba-Grown Cabbage
remarks: Buy Cabbage Seedlings and grow three Hiranya Cabbages in your garden. Give these to the housewife.

name: Desk Refurbishing, Part 2
remarks: Dropped by Crying Table, Steamy Bathhouse (8F-10F)

name: The Cleaning Club's Passion
remarks: Obtain the Iai Katana from Daidara Metalworks (sell six Golden Cloths dropped by Phantom Mage, Yukiko's Castle 4F-6F), trade the Iai Katana to the student on Practice Building 2F to obtain the Cleaning Mop. After accepting the hospital job, buy the Cleaning Uniform from Croco Fur in Okina City (¥14,800). Show these to the student on 3F.

name: Acquire Inaba Trout
remarks: Give Daidara an Inaba Trout. This can be fished from the river or bought from Tanaka's Amazing Commodities on 6/5 and 9/11.

name: Pining For Stylish Formalwear
quest_giver: Woman in heavy makeup, Okina City
remarks: Obtain Gentleman's Tux from a locked chest in Yukiko's Castle (3F-4F, 7F)

name: Harvest Two Types of Corn
remarks: Buy Barrier Corn seeds and harvest Tetracorn and Makaracorn for Daidara.

name: Acquire Some Fashionable Dishes
quest_giver: Avid reader in front of Yomenaido Bookstore
remarks: Dropped by Sky Balance, Marukyu Striptease (9F-10F), 3 needed

name: What Was That in the Movie?
remarks: Ask Ms. Sofue (Classroom Building 2F) about OOPArts, and then report to the movie girl.

name: Find Me Something to Wear
remarks: Obtain the Invincible Mini from Daidara (sell 8 Power Rocks dropped by Power Castle, Secret Laboratory B3F-B4F, B6F-B7F), give it to the NPC.

name: Find My Pet
remarks: Find the dog at Shopping District, North. Call her each of the names, with "Mika-chan" last. The dog will run away. Come back for three days, feeding her Steak Skewers from the shop she's sitting in front of each day. On the third day, call her name again.

name: Acquire Samegawa's Guardian
remarks: Catch the Guardian from the river.

name: Find My Pet, Part 2
remarks: Find the cat at the Riverbank. Call it the different names prompted, and feed it 5 different fish for 5 days. On the fifth day, call it by the prompted names again to finish the request.

name: Extracurricular Activities, Part 3
remarks: Dropped by Solemn Machine, Magatsu Mandala (5F, 6F)

name: Acquire Golden Chains
remarks: Dropped by Minotaur II, Magatsu Mandala (3F-6F)

name: Riddle Senpai's Encore!
remarks: "Uruguay"

name: Kashiwagi's Special Lesson
remarks: "Deoxyribonucleic Acid," "Rabbit"

name: Show Me Some Cute Slippers
remarks: Obtain Vidar's Boots from Daidara (sell 8 Bloody Hides dropped by Jotun of Blood, Heaven 8F-9F), trade the boots to the student on Practice Building 2F to obtain the Animal Slippers. Give the slippers to Kashiwagi.

name: Dazzle Me With Animal Paw Gloves
remarks: Magatsu Xandrite (x8) are dropped by golden Shadows in any dungeon. Mondo Stone (x1) is obtained from the Lady in White at the Tatsuhime Shrine at night, traded for a Guardian from the river. Take these to Shiroku Pub at night to obtain the Animal Paw.

name: Kashiwagi's Special Lesson, Part 2
remarks: "Raster," "Latin," "Rome"

name: A Student Should Study
remarks: "Wind," "Upper, Middle, and Lower," "7," "Mameluke"
